# Annotate Spatial Transcriptomics Skill v2.1.0

v2.1.0 is the stable complete-subtype-audit release.

- Audits every machine-actionable fine candidate under every present broad parent by default.
- Keeps broad-only as the correct endpoint when no independent child program passes.
- Adds catalog-bound, broad-locked fine writeback and a fail-closed final fine-state validator.
- Requires child discriminator programs; shared parent markers cannot select a subtype.
- Adds independent surface-epithelial versus mesothelial-like modules and a stromal mesenchymal-progenitor negative-audit route.
- Preserves v2.0.4 observation-subset broad writeback, full-catalog rescanning, all-cell Atlas concordance, QC-only Atlas rescue and post-Atlas broad completeness review.

The project framework schema remains 2.0.0.
